Welcome to 9to5Toys Steals Weekly – your go-to spot for already-affordable everyday essentials that are now selling for even less. This weekly roundup pulls together all of the Steals from the past week, and puts them in a digestable list for you to consume every Saturday morning. Some of this week’s most popular Steals include Silkland’s compact 240W USB/Thunderbolt 4 cable at $13.50, an already-affordable stainless steel dish drying rack for $20, and unsurprisingly, Spigen’s Athlex Air Apple Watch band for $20. Head below to see all of your options.

items.title: Extra 20% off already marked down Switch games today only: Animal Crossing, Zelda, Mario, Pokémon, more
items.summary:
Alongside the ongoing Days of Play PS5 game sale (you’ll find all of those below), today Woot has launched a wide-ranging game sale with loads of titles on sale including a host of Switch and Switch 2 games. Not only are these games already marked down, but for today only you can knock an additional 20% off here using code LEVEL20 at checkout. Some of the deals are already starting to sell out so get in there while you still can. 

Note: Use code LEVEL20 at checkout to knock an additional 20% off the prices listed below.

  • Animal Crossing: New Horizons – Nintendo Switch 2 Edition $55 (Reg. $70)
  • Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild $44 (Reg. $60)
  • The Legend of Zelda: Echoes of Wisdom $45 (Reg. $60)
  • The Legend of Zelda: Link’s Awakening $48 (Reg. $60)
  • Hyrule Warriors: Age of Imprisonment $60 (Reg. $70)

  • Super Mario Party Jamboree $47 (Reg. $60)

  • Paper Mario: The Thousand-Year Door $47 (Reg. $60)
  • Princess Peach: Showtime! $48 (Reg. $60)
  • And even more…

It usually goes for $400 direct from Govee and for as high as $430 at Amazon, which we’ve previously seen discounted as low as $240 before today’s deal. Now, it’s getting a larger-than-ever 50% markdown here that cuts $200 from the tag, landing it at a new all-time low price. You can also browse all the other Govee smart lighting deals from the direct website here, or in the official Amazon storefront here.
